granted_actions.name: Javelin of Lightning (Special Throw)
granted_actions.summary: When thrown, becomes a bolt of lightning. All creatures within 5 ft of the path (not target) make DC 13 Dex save or take 4d6 lightning damage (half on success). Returns after throwing.
